config: diffusion_nft single-frame: 2 outer x 2 batches x 4 timesteps, pickscore+clipscore, crush-smol prompts, beta .1 kl 1e-4 lr 3e-5
gate_yaml:
method:
  _target_: fastvideo.train.methods.rl.diffusion_nft.DiffusionNFTMethod
  adv_clip_max: 5
  adv_mode: all
  beta: 0.1
  decay_type: 1
  ema:
    decay: 0.9
    enabled: false
    update_after_step: 0
    validation: true
  kl_beta: 0.0001
  max_grad_norm: 1.0
  num_batches_per_epoch: 2
  num_inner_epochs: 1
  num_video_per_prompt: 2
  reward_fn:
    clipscore: 1.0
    pickscore: 1.0
  sample_train_batch_size: 2
  sampling:
    flow_shift: inherit
    num_steps: 4
    scheduler: flow_match_euler
    trajectory: ode
  terminal_progress: false
  timestep_fraction: 1.0
  train_batch_size: 2
  validation:
    batch_size: 16
    data_path: null
    every_steps: 1000000
    log_samples: true
    num_prompts: 16
    num_steps: 40
    seed: 42
models:
  old:
    _target_: fastvideo.train.models.wan.WanModel
    disable_custom_init_weights: true
    init_from: Wan-AI/Wan2.1-T2V-1.3B-Diffusers
    trainable: false
  reference:
    _target_: fastvideo.train.models.wan.WanModel
    disable_custom_init_weights: true
    init_from: Wan-AI/Wan2.1-T2V-1.3B-Diffusers
    trainable: false
  student:
    _target_: fastvideo.train.models.wan.WanModel
    init_from: Wan-AI/Wan2.1-T2V-1.3B-Diffusers
    trainable: true
pipeline:
  flow_shift: 8
training:
  checkpoint:
    checkpoints_total_limit: 3
    output_dir: /tmp/fv2_rl_capture
    training_state_checkpointing_steps: 1000000
  data:
    data_path: /home/willlin/.cache/huggingface/hub/datasets--wlsaidhi--crush-smol_processed_t2v/snapshots/67dd07f2163ad2b3397f8b3d8125b67ca452dc85/combined_parquet_dataset
    dataloader_num_workers: 0
    num_frames: 1
    num_height: 448
    num_latent_t: 1
    num_width: 832
    preprocessed_data_type: t2v
    seed: 42
    train_batch_size: 1
    training_cfg_rate: 0.0
  distributed:
    hsdp_replicate_dim: 1
    hsdp_shard_dim: 1
    num_gpus: 1
    sp_size: 1
    tp_size: 1
  loop:
    gradient_accumulation_steps: 2
    max_train_steps: 2
  model:
    enable_gradient_checkpointing_type: null
  optimizer:
    betas:
    - 0.9
    - 0.999
    learning_rate: 3.0e-05
    lr_scheduler: constant
    lr_warmup_steps: 0
    weight_decay: 0.0001
  tracker:
    project_name: diffusion_nft_wan
    run_name: wan2.1_diffusion_nft_pick_clip
self_noise_note: max |total_loss| spread over 3 identical-seed capture runs (all steps)
